name: Deep link opens an iteration's story card and offers a copy-link button
description: Loading the page with a query parameter selecting iteration 2 opens that iteration's story card directly, and the card provides a button to copy a shareable permalink.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage with the query string ?i=2 appended to the URL
Verify a story card is already open below the ring showing ITERATION #2, a PASS or FAIL verdict, and an evidence section with a run id — without the user having clicked anything
Verify the open story card contains a button to copy a shareable link to this iteration
